ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-12-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar May-03-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salcedo.
Hugo TOrbet, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Ike Feldman and Lara Jealous.
Plaintiff's witness: Ike Feldman, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defendants: Helen J. Morris and Thomas Reed as follows:
Principal $450.00
Interest $173.22
Attorney's Fees $2,700.00
Costs $299.77
Judgment signed in open court.

Off Calendar Dec-17-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Charles B. Wood, Esq. of FAVARO, LAVEZZO 707/552-3630, for defendant Helen Morris, moving for order setting aside default

Ruling:

MINI MINUTES: Pltiff, Ike Feldman present with counsel, Hugo Torbet.

Plaintiff is seeking default judgment against only one Defendant, Helen J. Morris.

Costs $241.00
Plaintiff to dismissed all other defendants by July 25, 2003.
